summary: Bug Fix Verified: Product Extras are now correctly included in sales reports and dashboard statistics. All 9 tests passed. The fix properly calculates order totals including extras prices, stores extras_total on each item, and both dashboard stats and smart reports endpoints show correct totals.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: OrderItemCreate model now includes `extras` field (line 1250)
Fix verified: Subtotal calculation now includes extras price: (base_price + extras_price) * quantity (lines 4594-4605)
Fix verified: Each order item now has `extras_total` field showing the price of extras (line 4644)
Dashboard stats and smart reports correctly include extras via order.total field
seed_data_creation: Created test order with extras: product price 5000 * 2 + extras (1500+500) * 2 = 14000 total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for product extras in sales reports verified. Test orders exist with extras_total field. Dashboard stats and smart reports endpoints correctly include extras in totals. Test branch ID: 4e275c2c-52b0-4cac-a46a-2cba5b3e835f, Test product ID: 81765759-2465-4d7c-b5ec-cf81addcba7a

tests_performed.details: Super admin login works with owner@maestroegp.com
Order created with extras. Expected total: 14000, Actual total: 14000. extras_total field correctly set to 2000 (1500+500)
Found 4 orders with extras, all have extras_total field set correctly
Dashboard shows Total Sales: 59000, Total Orders: 4, Average: 14750 - includes extras via order.total
Smart reports shows Total Sales: 59000, Total Orders: 4 - includes extras via order.total
Verified subtotal calculation: (base_price + extras_price) * quantity matches stored subtotal
Dashboard and Smart Reports show consistent totals (59000 sales, 4 orders)

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug was that product extras prices were not being included in sales reports and dashboard statistics. The fix added: 1) `extras` field to OrderItemCreate model to accept extras data, 2) Updated subtotal calculation to sum (item.price + extras_price) * quantity, 3) Added `extras_total` field to each order item for tracking. Since dashboard stats and smart reports use order.total (which is derived from subtotal), they now correctly include extras.
